models.name: Learned local classifier
models.expected_accuracy: Best fit after training on your own tagged library.
models.description: Uses your trained light/heavy classifier instead of an external audio model. Select mode=learned or mode=all with a classifier file.

models.name: MAEST Discogs 30s 129e
models.expected_accuracy: Best public preset candidate for Discogs-style music genre labels.
models.description: Large MAEST Discogs model using 30-second inputs and 129 training epochs. Good first choice when processing time is acceptable.

models.name: MAEST Discogs 30s 73e teacher-student
models.expected_accuracy: Balanced default used by ClaveTagger so far.
models.description: Current default. Uses the same Discogs label family as the config mapping and has been used for the existing reports.

models.name: MAEST Discogs 10s 129e
models.expected_accuracy: Likely less stable than 30s, but useful for quicker broad scans.
models.description: Shorter MAEST window. Best used with full-track averaging when speed matters.

models.name: MAEST Discogs 5s 129e
models.expected_accuracy: Most useful for quick experiments; likely least stable on sparse genre cues.
models.description: Shortest MAEST preset. Use for rough scans or with full-track averaging.

models.name: Custom Hugging Face audio-classification model
models.expected_accuracy: Unknown until evaluated against your tagged library.
models.description: Enter any Hugging Face audio-classification model id. You will usually need to add its labels to category_config.json model_labels.

models.name: CLAP HTSAT fused
models.expected_accuracy: Promising for zero-shot comparison against your category names, but not wired into the current audio-classification backend.
models.description: Requires a zero-shot audio backend with candidate labels; the current ClaveTagger audio path does not call this mode yet.

models.name: MuQ large MSD
models.expected_accuracy: Potentially useful as embeddings for a learned classifier, not as a direct category mapper yet.
models.description: Music foundation model trained on Million Song Dataset features. It needs a separate embedding/classifier backend.
